en_title: No, There Is No GTA 6 Physical Disc Coming Out at Launch or the Months After — Those Reports and Social Media Posts Are Incorrect
subtitle: 只有兑换码，没有盘
opus_summary: 社交平台关于《GTA6》实体光盘的传言实为误解。Rockstar客服邮件所指「实物版」为含兑换码的纸盒，并非光盘。好莱坞报道者确认Rockstar无光盘生产计。

paragraphs.en: Viral social media posts and articles claiming a physical disc copy of GTA 6 is in the works are incorrect.
paragraphs.cn: 那些声称《GTA6》会推出实体光盘的热门社交帖子与文章，都不属实。

paragraphs.en: Various articles and social media accounts reported that GTA 6 would launch on an actual disc by the end of this year after an image featuring comments from Rockstar Support went viral, garnering millions of views. The support email said: “You will be able to acquire a physical copy during the following months.” While the email is legitimate, it does not indicate a disc version is in the works.
paragraphs.cn: 此前，一张包含Rockstar客服留言的截图在网上疯传，获得数以百万计的浏览量。多家媒体与社交账号据此报道称，《GTA6》将在今年年底前推出实体光盘。该客服邮件写道：「您将能在接下来的几个月内获得实体版。」邮件本身确实是真实的，但其中并未暗示有光盘版正在制作。

paragraphs.en: The Hollywood Reporter confirmed that the support email was a genuine response to a ticket filed to Rockstar Support asking for a disc version of GTA 6, and that while the response was poorly worded, it did not announce any change in policy, nor confirm a disc release was in the works.
paragraphs.cn: 《好莱坞报道者》证实，这封客服邮件确实是Rockstar客服就一份要求《GTA6》推出光盘版的工单所作的真实回复。尽管回复措辞不当，但它既没有宣布任何政策转变，也没有确认实体光盘版正在制作。

paragraphs.en: THR said “a source with knowledge” of Rockstar’s GTA 6 launch strategy told it there are “no plans” for GTA 6 discs to be printed, “not at launch, and not months after.”
paragraphs.cn: 该媒体引用了解Rockstar《GTA6》发行策略的「知情人士」的消息称，Rockstar「没有计划」印制《GTA6》光盘，「发售时不印，数月后也不印」。

paragraphs.en: When Rockstar Support mentioned a “physical copy,” it was referring to the physical version the company has already announced — the one that comes with just a code in the box. “The following months,” just means following preorders going live this week and all the announcements that came with it, not the following months after GTA 6 goes live in November.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar客服提到的「实体版」，指的是该公司早已公布的那种版本——盒子里只包含一张兑换码。而「接下来的几个月」，仅仅是指本周预购开启及其所有相关公告之后的这段时间，并非指《GTA6》11月发售之后的几个月。

paragraphs.en: Now, plenty of people have questioned Rockstar’s announcement language here — should we really be calling it a “physical version” if there’s no disc? But the upshot is there is no disc coming. So, if you want to play GTA 6, you’ll need to download the game.
paragraphs.cn: 如今已有不少人质疑Rockstar的公告措辞——如果没有光盘，真的能叫「实体版」吗？但关键是，确实不会有光盘。所以，如果你想玩《GTA6》，就必须下载游戏。

paragraphs.en: There were also headlines this week based on a report from a Polish website and its “insider” who claimed a disc version of GTA 6 was due out in December. While the report provided fans with more hope, it was wrong, too.
paragraphs.cn: 本周，一家波兰网站及其「内部人士」也发布了一则头条新闻，声称《GTA6》的光盘版将于12月推出。虽然这篇报道给粉丝带来了一丝希望，但它同样是不实消息。

paragraphs.en: Why has Rockstar decided not to go with a disc version of GTA 6, and risking angering core gamers in the process? There are a number of reasons, analysts told IGN this week, and they all make commercial sense . Meanwhile, some retailers are refusing to sell GTA 6 because the physical version lacks a disc .
paragraphs.cn: 为何Rockstar决定不推出《GTA6》实体光盘，甚至不惜在此过程中激怒核心玩家？分析师本周告诉IGN，原因有很多，且都符合商业逻辑。与此同时，一些零售商因为实体版不含光盘而拒绝销售《GTA6》。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, IGN reported on the results of our own poll where we asked if you’re going to buy the $100 Ultimate Edition or the $80 Standard Edition. Somewhat surprisingly, over 70% of you intend to buy the more expensive version.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，IGN报道了自家发起的一项调查结果，问大家打算购买100美元(约合人民币680元)的终极版还是80美元(约合人民币544元)的标准版。稍显意外的是，超过70%的人倾向于更贵的版本。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上找到他：@wyp100。也可通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系。
